meaning: n.大学运动队第二队(队员)adj.大学运动队第二队(队员的)
examples: He easily became the best player on the jayvee that year.
He was so good, in fact, that the jayvee games became quite popular.
The entire varsity began to come early so they could watch him play in the jayvee games.
There is, however, a positive side to this jayvee ranting: it shows that we have systems of values supported by worldviews that drive our hopes and dreams.
